title: JavaScript
description: Master the language of the web. ES6+, closures, promises, async/await, DOM manipulation, and more.

title: TypeScript
description: Type-safe JavaScript. Interfaces, generics, enums, type inference, advanced types & patterns.

title: React
description: Build modern UIs. Hooks, state management, context API, Next.js, server components, and patterns.

title: React Native
description: Cross-platform mobile apps. Navigation, native APIs, performance optimization, and deployment.

title: Linux
description: From zero to hero. File system, permissions, processes, networking, shell scripting, and system admin.

title: DevOps
description: CI/CD, Docker, Kubernetes, cloud services, monitoring, infrastructure as code, and automation.

title: Database
description: SQL, NoSQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, indexing, queries, normalization, and data modeling.

title: Machine Learning
description: Python, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, neural networks, NLP, computer vision, and model deployment.

title: Git
description: Version control mastery. Commits, branches, merging, remotes, GitHub, collaboration workflows, and advanced Git.
